genre_preference.value: dislikes horror, thriller; mixed feelings about drama
evidence: "Not a horror movie. Hardly even a thriller. Definitely not scary."
"I hated every character in this movie"
"The storyline was predictable with little to offer in the way of ingenuity or thrill factor."
"I could have sworn I saw the following scenes... I'm kinda pissed off."
"My time is too precious to waste and so is yours!!!!"
"I truly can't believe how this film can get good reviews."
"the acting was bad, the editing was atrocious, and I found myself squirming in my seat, waiting for this to be over."
"I shudder to think that these acting hacks will receive royalties from the continued running of these films."
"I would never believe that anyone could absolutely destroy the Buffyverse like the writers in Season 7 did."
"the only shining light in this whole movie was Elvira herself..."
"the music was fun and stuck in my head for hours afterward, and the scenery was beautiful as well."
"I have zero empathy for them. No need to watch this."
"I was blown over. Charlotte has become one of the most developed characters in the show."

summary: The user has a strong aversion to poorly executed horror and thriller genres, often criticizing predictable narratives and low-quality production. They seem to prefer character-driven stories but express frustration when character development is lacking or poorly executed.
